headings.description: Clean, authoritative, and Swiss-inspired for high contrast and readability. Avoid generic sans-serif for impact.

body.description: Sterile, highly legible for data-heavy tables and financial numbers.

mono.description: For financial figures, ticker symbols, and dynamic scoring.

colors.description: Authority, clarity, and truth. Stark white bases, deep navy/black text, with semantic colors strictly for financial indicators. Never mix currencies without context.

surfaces.name: Dashboard Cards
surfaces.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-gray-200), no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-md).

surfaces.name: AI Agent Panel
surfaces.style: Glassmorphism (Crystal/Apple variant). High opacity background (bg-white/70), heavy blur (backdrop-blur-xl), 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40). ambient shadow.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) to break absolute digital flatness, maintaining a premium feel.

grids.dashboard: High Density Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Summary cards take col-span-1, main charts take col-span-2 or 3.
grids.portfolio_list: Table-based layout for products. Responsive lists on mobile.

layouts.general: Role-First Hierarchy. Sidebar navigation + Top Header with User Profile. Main content area structured with progressive disclosure.
layouts.questionnaire: Focused, centered layout with step indicators. Maximum width for readability, ample padding (p-12).
layouts.ai_agent: Floating panel (bottom-right) or side-drawer, visually distinct via Glassmorphism to show it acts across contexts.

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements (bg darkening or subtle lift). Focus states clearly defined with ring-2 of primary accent color.
motion.transitions: Page transitions and chart loading use smooth ease-out animations. The AI agent panel expands with a bouncy spring animation (framer-motion).

component_instructions.navigation: Sidebar with Phosphor icons. Top header with breadcrumbs and user avatar.
component_instructions.dashboard_cards: Use Shadcn Card component. Remove default shadows, enforce 1px border. Use semantic colors for positive/negative return badges.
component_instructions.charts: Recharts for Portfolio Performance (Line Chart) and Asset Allocation (Donut Chart). Ensure tooltips are styled clearly.
component_instructions.questionnaire: Multi-step form wizard using Shadcn Forms. Progress bar at top. Large, clickable option cards for horizons.
component_instructions.product_list: Data table (Shadcn Table) with sorting and filtering (Tabs for Stocks, Mutual Funds, etc.). Include Risk Badges (Pill shape, semantic colors).
component_instructions.ai_agent: Chat interface. Input field with a microphone icon for voice context. Messages styled as bubbles. Floating action button to toggle visibility.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA contrast ratios, especially financial figures and badges.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='ai-agent-toggle', data-testid='portfolio-tab-stocks').

media.icons_library: @phosphor-icons/react (for professional, clean duotone/regular weights matching the fintech vibe).

images.description: Professional female headshot for user profile
Professional male headshot for user profile
Minimalist blue/white abstract sphere for AI Agent identity
Modern glass skyscraper facade for optional onboarding/login background

3d_libraries.usage: Minimal. Use Recharts for 2D data visualization. For the AI agent, a simple CSS pulsing effect or Spline embed (if needed for a 3D sphere) can be used, but CSS/SVG animations are preferred for performance in this data-heavy context.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Objectives, Products).
Construct the Portfolio Overview Dashboard with Shadcn Cards and Recharts (Line for net worth, Donut for allocation).
Develop the Financial Objectives Questionnaire as a step-by-step wizard.
Create the Investment Options Product List using Shadcn Tabs (Stocks, ETFs, Crypto, etc.) and Table.
Implement the AI Talking Agent as a floating, draggable (or fixed bottom-right) glassmorphism chat panel with text and voice inputs.
Strictly follow the color palette: white/gray backgrounds, dark text, and semantic green/red. Do not overuse primary color.
Ensure all data points are properly formatted as currency or percentages.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, tabs, and interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetic. Create depth with borders and subtle hover states.
Do not center-align the app container (`.App { text-align: center; }` is forbidden).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp with interaction animations).
NEVER use emojis as icons. Use Phosphor Icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus rings).
Ensure generous spacing (p-6 to p-8 inside cards).
